milestones.title: Workflow bootstrap (superseded)
milestones.goal: Superseded by M002-M009 Zotero 9 migration + refactoring roadmap.

milestones.title: Test foundation for pure logic
milestones.goal: Jest coverage for pure logic with globalThis.Zotero stubs via setupFiles.

milestones.title: Zotero 9-only core: manifest + direct mergeItems
milestones.goal: Zotero 9 only: all version metadata updated, direct mergeItems ESM, dead code removed.
acceptance: manifest + template have 9.0/9.*; build generates correct update files

milestones.title: Zotero 9 MenuManager-only migration
milestones.goal: MenuManager-only: context callbacks, FTL .label, prefixed l10nID, sync onShowing, explicit unregisterMenu.
acceptance: item callbacks use ctx.items; collection callbacks use ctx.collectionTreeRow
no active-pane dependency in menu command path
cache miss → disabled submenu; cache invalidated after mark/unmark
manual: mark/unmark toggles correctly on re-right-click

milestones.title: Typed AppState replacing addon.data
milestones.goal: Typed AppState interface + scoped accessors. Entry-points (index.ts, addon.ts) exempt.

milestones.title: Lifecycle disposers + patch split + own patchMethod
milestones.goal: DisposerRegistry + patchMethod() (restores originals) + patch split + wire ALL resources.
in_scope: global + window registries with explicit win param
Scope BulkDuplicates window state per Window; remove singleton this.win
acceptance: patchMethod restores originals (safe skip when externally modified)
per-window registrars use win.ZoteroPane not getActiveZoteroPane()

milestones.title: Non-duplicates action/UI separation
milestones.goal: Extract toggle/action logic from UI registration.

milestones.title: Resolve duplicates circular dependency
milestones.goal: Break cycle via button ID constants + factory injection (not just file moves).

milestones.title: Feature boundary reorganization
milestones.goal: Reorganize src/ into feature boundaries. Two-level registration (global + window). Extract onNotify. Split menus. hooks.ts becomes composition root.
in_scope: extract onNotify handlers into features; notifier.ts receives handlers via params (no feature imports)
acceptance: src/modules/ and src/utils/ directories do not exist
hooks.ts is pure composition root with no onNotify logic
integrations/zotero/notifier.ts does not import feature modules directly
Public addon.hooks contract compatible with bootstrap.js and preferences.xhtml
typings/global.d.ts Addon and ZToolkit import paths updated

milestones.title: Local DB bug fix + key columns + schema versioning
milestones.goal: Fix getNonDuplicates WHERE clause bug, introduce schema versioning and migration infrastructure, add itemKey/itemKey2 columns for stable Zotero item key storage.
in_scope: Migration v0->v1 with key columns and libraryID index
Extend insert methods to store item keys
acceptance: Insert stores both itemIDs and keys

milestones.title: SyncedSettings store with read-write capability
milestones.goal: Create SyncedSettings-backed abstraction for non-duplicate pairs with round-trip read/write capability.

milestones.title: Sync conflict resolution and cleanup
milestones.goal: Register onSyncDownload listener with union-merge conflict resolution and key-based cleanup for deleted items.

milestones.title: Wire non-duplicate sync into runtime workflow
milestones.goal: Wire SyncedSettings into runtime: startup hydration, dual-write mark/unmark, sync listener registration, end-to-end tests.
acceptance: SyncedSettings failure doesn't block local ops

allowed_reasons: Blocker repair: bug or design flaw in accepted milestone blocking current
Missing infrastructure: gap in tooling, CI, or test fixtures
External dependency changes: upstream breaking change
Critical safety issues: security vulnerability or data integrity
requirements: Verified with tests before resuming planned milestone

backlog: Adopt Zotero 9 advanced merge features (PDF hash matching, annotation preservation)
Increase test coverage for Zotero-dependent integration paths
Non-duplicate pair set size cap with LRU eviction for SyncedSettings scalability
